lanes.name: The Living Itinerary
lanes.narrative: Deepen the core promise. Start by letting Waypoint read your inbox instead of your typing, end with it architecting real multi-city trips and speaking up before you even ask.

lanes.name: Waypoint Calls
lanes.narrative: Take the flagship disruption call and grow it into a full calling relationship — first reaching the traveler directly, then making the call itself real, then making it available for anything, not just emergencies.

lanes.name: Travel Together
lanes.narrative: Break the single-traveler wall on purpose. Start by putting companions on the same live board, then settle up the money between them, and end with a standing memory of every trip and every person you've traveled with.

lanes.name: Waypoint in Your Pocket
lanes.narrative: Take voice-first to its conclusion beyond the browser. Start with your wallet and a phone number, end with a phone call that is the whole product, no screen required.

lanes.name: The Trip, Understood
lanes.narrative: Turn the event log Waypoint already keeps into something that looks back and looks forward — a story worth sharing, and a ranker that gets sharper every trip.
